data.content: 1) src/components/use-beat-detail-data.ts: useAddDepMutation currently only invalidates beat-deps cache on add-dependency success. Acceptance requires user-initiated beat changes to be reflected in queue/active views within 1 second; dependency edits can change beat attributes/relationships, but this path has no list-level invalidation. 2) Implementation lacks the requested Playwright automated test coverage: there is no Playwright/e2e test scaffold or timing test for create/update flows, so criteria around 1-second verification and network monitoring are unverified by test.,
